mapper.select: SELECT idempotent_key, user_id, operation, biz_id, request_hash, request_status, response_payload, expire_at, created_at, updated_at FROM bluenote_comment.comment_idempotent_request WHERE idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey}
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_comment.comment_idempotent_request SET biz_id = #{bizId}, request_status = 'SUCCESS', response_payload = #{responsePayload}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey} AND request_status = 'PROCESSING'
